steps.title: Find the practical use
steps.content: The passage says Mars simulants help scientists evaluate how well their devices will handle the surface when operated on Mars. Their value is in testing equipment under Mars-like surface conditions.

steps.title: Use the equipment test
steps.content: The matching choice says simulants let scientists test whether equipment can withstand mission conditions. Choice A invents tracking chemical changes over time, Choice B invents a planet-to-planet comparison, and Choice C shifts the use to extreme terrains on Earth. The answer is D.
